sections.paragraph: m. Hades, prop. the place of rest, Isa 38:11. See the root תָדַל No. 1, ; comp. דּוּמִיָּח. [If this be the import of this word, the whole verse must be construed thus: “I said, I shall not see Jah even Jah in the land of the living; I shall behold man no more; with (i.e. when I am with) the inhabitants of Hades.”]
